comments.text: Sir, maine 'A' hospital se CT scan aur X-ray karaya tha, aur wahan unhone surgery recommend ki thi. Uske baad mai 'B' hospital gaya aur wahan admit ho gaya. Ab mai post-hospitalization ka claim to B hospital se le sakta hoon, lekin pre-hospitalization joke sare test A hospital mai hue they unka claim muje kaise milega.
